reliabilityChanges: Microphone acquisition and native/web recorder startup terminate visibly after 30 seconds.
A browser microphone stream resolving after timeout is immediately closed.

Timed-out recording startup reconciles bounded stop and authoritative storage evidence: verified audio is recovered, proven-empty shells are removed, and uncertain evidence retains a recovery shell without deletion.
Optional haptics cannot delay recording startup or audio finalization.

ios.knownHostGate: Xcode 26.3 cannot mount the developer disk image for the paired iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build and fault-injection evidence does not prove physical recorder-start timeout behavior, locked 60/120-minute recording, real saved-audio transcription, interruption recovery, or destination-app receipt.
